parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { status: 'sem_contatos', message: $json.message || 'Sem contatos para enviar.' } }];

conditions.leftValue: ={{ (() => { const tz = String($env.CAMPAIGN_TIMEZONE || 'America/Sao_Paulo'); const h = Number(new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-US', { hour: '2-digit', hour12: false, timeZone: tz }).format(new Date())); const start = Number($env.CAMPAIGN_START_HOUR || 9); const end = Number($env.CAMPAIGN_END_HOUR || 17); return h >= start && h < end; })() }}
={{ (() => { const lock = String($env.CAMPAIGN_SEND_LOCK || 'true').toLowerCase() === 'true'; const dry = String($env.CAMPAIGN_DRY_RUN || 'true').toLowerCase() === 'true'; return lock || dry; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { number: String($('Montar Template Teste').item.json.phone || ''), text: String($('Montar Template Teste').item.json.mensagem_final || '') } }}
={{ { number: String($json.phone || ''), options: { delay: Number($json.typing_delay_ms || 2000), presence: String($json.typing_presence || 'composing') } } }}
